search_candidates.title: Investor Relations - Ciputra Development
search_candidates.content: Board of commissioners, composed of professionals coming from diverse background, ensures the continuity of our business in creating long-term value to both shareholders and the company. **Rina Ciputra Sastrawinata** President Commissioner. To support the execution of the duties and responsibilities of Board of Commissioners, Audit Committee is established to perform monitoring function towards the implementation of good corporate governance (GCG) and the quality of financial information. Prior to becoming a Commissioner of the Company, she served as President Director of the Company (1983-1990), Commissioner of the Company (1990-1993), and Director of the Company (1993-2017). Currently, she also serves as Commissioner and Director in several companies under Ciputra Group, such as President Director of Ciputra Artpreneur Jakarta. Junita Ciputra is the second daughter of Dr. She joined the Company in 1988 as a Finance Manager and was appointed as Director of the Company in 2001, based on Deed No. 29 December 14, 2001. Cakra Ciputra, Indonesian, born in 1964, has been reappointed as a Director of the Company since January 2017.

dividends.evidence_text: dividends, bonus shares, changes in share value, or the saham, dan penerbitan efek konversi. Selain itu, Perseroan issuance of convertible securities. In addition, the Company tidak menerima sanksi dari regulator. Seluruh aktivitas did not incur any sanctions from regulators. All stock trading perdagangan saham telah dilaksanakan sesuai dengan activities were conducted in accordance with applicable kebijakan serta peraturan yang berlaku. policies and regulations. Peristiwa Penting Important Events 28 Februari / February - 28 Maret / March Perseroan telah melaksanakan penawaran tender wajib The Company conducted a mandatory tender offer with (mandatory tender offer) dengan PT Bahtera Bintang PT Bahtera Bintang Nusantara (BBN) as the Controlling Nusantara (BBN) sebagai Pemegang Saham Pengendali Shareholder of the Company. The offer took place from Perseroan. Penawaran tersebut berlangsung dari tanggal February 28 to March 28, 2024, and the payment for the 28 Februari hingga 28 Maret 2024, dan pembayaran atas offer was made on April 5, 2024. A total of 139,443,300 penawaran tersebut telah dilakukan pada tanggal 5 April shares, or 4.91% of the total paid-up and issued capital of 2024. Sebanyak 139.443.300 saham atau 4,91% dari the Company, were successfully purchased in the tender jumlah modal disetor dan ditempatkan oleh Perseroan offer. The results of the mandatory tender offer by BBN for berhasil dibeli dalam pelaksanaan penawaran tersebut. the Company’s shares were published on the Indonesia Stock Laporan hasil penawaran tender wajib oleh BBN atas saham- Exchange website (www.idx.co.id) on April 16, 2024. saham Perseroan telah dipublikasikan di situs web Bursa Efek Indonesia (www.idx.co.id) pada tanggal 16 April 2024. 27 Juni / June Perseroan menyelenggarakan Rapat Umum Pemegang The Company held its Annual General Meeting of Saham (RUPS) Tahunan di Gedung Meta Epsi Shareholders (GMS) at the Meta Epsi Building Annual Report and Sustainability Report 2024 13 Kilas Kinerja Laporan Manajemen Profil Perusahaan Analisis dan Pembahasan Manajemen Performance Highlights Management Report Company Profile Management Discussion and Analysis Sertifikasi Certification ISO 9001:2015 ISO 14001:2015 ISO 45001:2018 Quality Management System Environmental Management System Occupational Health & Safety Management System Penyelenggara/ Organizer Penyelenggara/ Organizer Penyelenggara/ Organizer SCK Certifications Pvt Ltd ARS Assessment Private Limited ARS Assessment Private Limited Masa Berlaku/ Period Masa Berlaku/ Period Masa Berlaku/ Period 26 October 2022 – 25 October 2025 12 March 2024 – 11 March 2025 12 March 2024 – 11 March 2025 Penerima/ Recipient Penerima/ Recipient Penerima/ Recipient PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk ISO 37001:2016 Jartup License Construction Service Anti Bribery Management System 066/TEL.01.02/2020 Work Permit Grade 7 Penyelenggara/ Organizer Penyelenggara/ Organizer Penyelenggara/ Organizer Garuda Sertifikasi Indonesia Kementerian Komunikasi dan Informasi Gabungan Perusahaan Konstruksi (Kominfo) Nasional Indonesia (GAPEKSINDO) Masa Berlaku/ Period Masa Berlaku/ Period Masa Berlaku/ Period 11 January 2023 – 10 January 2026 3 November 2025 - Penerima/ Recipient Penerima/ Recipient Penerima/ Recipient PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk PT

KEBIJAKAN AKUNTANSI SIGNIFIKAN (lanjutan) 2. SIGNIFICANT ACCOUNTING POLICIES (continued) ae. Biaya Emisi Obligasi dan Saham ae. Bonds and Shares Issuance Costs Biaya emisi obligasi merupakan biaya transaksi yang Bonds issuance costs are transaction costs to be dikurangkan langsung dari hasil emisi untuk deducted from the proceeds in order to determine the menentukan hasil emisi bersih obligasi. Selisih antara net proceeds of bonds. The difference between the net hasil emisi bersih dengan nilai nominal merupakan proceeds and the nominal value is a discount or diskonto dan diamortisasi selama jangka waktu premium and will be amortized over the term of the obligasi tersebut. Biaya emisi saham merupakan bonds. Share issuance costs represent the akumulasi biaya yang terjadi sehubungan dengan accumulated costs incurred in connection with the penawaran umum perdana saham Perusahaan Company’s initial public offering. Shares issuance kepada masyarakat. Biaya emisi saham disajikan costs are presented as an additional paid in capital and sebagai bagian tambahan modal disetor dan tidak not amortized. diamortisasi. af.
